channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Laos faces criticism over tourist deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol due to lack of autopsies
item.description: Laotian authorities have charged a distillery owner and 10 hostel employees over the deaths of six tourists in 2024, which were initially linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. However, the lack of autop...

item.title: Dorothy O'Hara: Postwar Hollywood Fashion Designer
item.description: Dorothy O'Hara was a prominent American fashion designer active in the 1940s and 1950s, celebrated for her glamorous, figure-enhancing dresses that epitomized Hollywood glamour on the West Coast. Star...

item.title: Rep. Jim Himes Condemns Sen. Tommy Tuberville for Promoting Election Fraud Conspiracy Theories
item.description: Rep. Jim Himes (D-Conn.) strongly criticized Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Ala.) for amplifying President Donald Trump's baseless claims of election fraud. Himes accused Tuberville of participating in a 'c...

item.title: Former President Jonathan Offers Condolences to Amaechi Family Following Mother's Passing
item.description: Former President Goodluck Jonathan has expressed deep sadness over the passing of Dame Mary Amaechi, the mother of former Rivers State Governor Rotimi Amaechi. In a statement released by his media adv...

item.title: Supreme Court Clarifies: Abusive Language and Swearing Not Obscene Under IPC
item.description: The Supreme Court has ruled that using abusive language or swearing words does not constitute obscenity under the Indian Penal Code (IPC). The court emphasized that mere vulgar or profane expressions,...

item.title: Tears Animal Rescue Urges Adoption and Fostering to Alleviate Winter Strain on Dogs
item.description: Tears Animal Rescue, a local organisation, is currently caring for 109 dogs this winter, including 45 puppies and 64 adult dogs, which exceeds its ideal capacity of 100. The organisation is urgently a...

item.title: Fraudulent Sick Notes Undermine Justice and Professional Ethics
item.description: The article examines the widespread issue of fraudulent sick notes in South Africa, highlighting their detrimental impact on justice systems, governance, and professional ethics. It emphasizes that su...

item.title: France and England Play for Bronze in FIFA World Cup Third-Place Match
item.description: The article details the FIFA World Cup third-place playoff between France and England, where the winning team secured a bronze medal. The match, officiated by Venezuelan referee Jesús Valenzuela, took...

item.title: Iranian strikes kill two US troops, one missing in Jordan airbase attack
item.description: Two US military personnel have been killed and another is missing following a series of Iranian strikes targeting an airbase in Jordan, according to a report published on July 19, 2026. The attack, wh...

item.title: Chelsea Signs Morgan Rogers, Arsenal Misses Out on Key Transfer
item.description: Chelsea has reached a verbal agreement with Aston Villa to sign England international attacking midfielder Morgan Rogers in a British record transfer fee of KSh 20 billion (£117 million). The 23-year-...

item.title: Andy Burnham Prioritises Cost of Living and North Sea Drilling Over Digital ID Plans
item.description: Andy Burnham, the incoming UK Prime Minister, has announced he will abandon plans for a government-issued digital ID system, redirecting resources to address the cost of living crisis. This decision f...

item.title: Pro-Trump influencer Andrew Tate arrested in Florida under sealed warrant
item.description: Andrew Tate, a prominent pro-Trump influencer and former reality TV star, was arrested in Miami, Florida, under a sealed warrant, according to U.S. Marshals Service. The arrest follows British prosecu...

item.title: Legal Aid Initiatives in TZ-Germany Benefit Over 5 Million Tanzanians
item.description: The news highlights two key developments. First, a legal aid initiative between Tanzania and Germany has reached over five million Tanzanians, providing critical support for marginalized groups. This ...

item.title: Optus and TPG propose 25-metre phone tower on Burns Club golf course
item.description: A 25-metre phone tower designed to enhance Optus and TPG services in Holt and surrounding areas has been proposed for the Burns Club's golf course in Belconnen. The development application, submitted ...

item.title: Iranian attack kills two US soldiers at Jordan base
item.description: The US military confirmed Friday that two soldiers were killed and another went missing in an Iranian attack on a military base in Jordan. This marks the first US troop deaths from direct Iranian fire...

item.title: UK Prime Minister Abandons Digital ID Scheme, Redirects Funds to Cost of Living
item.description: Incoming British Prime Minister Andy Burnham has announced the cancellation of the government's controversial digital ID scheme, redirecting resources to address the cost of living crisis. The decisio...

item.title: Trump criticized for golf club visits amid U.S. military casualties in Iran conflict
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump faced widespread criticism for attending his Trump National Golf Club in New Jersey on Saturday, days after at least two American service members were killed in a military ...

item.title: Tanzania's government outlines measures to stabilize maize prices through NFRA purchases
item.description: The Tanzanian government has announced plans to address declining maize prices by launching official purchases through the National Food Reserve Agency (NFRA). Farmers are facing severe financial chal...

item.title: Mercy Eke's Life Updates: Challenges, Relationships, and Future Plans
item.description: Mercy Eke, the former Big Brother Naija winner, has shared her life updates after her second stint on the reality show. She discussed the challenges she faced while pursuing her master's degree in Bus...

item.title: Top Pool Vacuums for Efficient Maintenance
item.description: Maintaining a pristine pool requires effective cleaning tools, and several options are available to simplify the process. Manual vacuums like the Sepetrel Pool Vacuum Head with Side Brushes ($69.99) o...
